arts.ttl: Paul Warne reveals missing transfer piece and how long before his Derby County vision is complete
arts.sum: There is still a sense that despite all of the progress which has been made under Paul Warne, we are truly yet to see a squad that Derby County's head coach can truly call his own. January's transfer window will present him with another chance to make any changes he sees fit, but that is often a stop-gap to the major work that takes place in the summer.

arts.ttl: Norwich City fired Pride Park warning as Derby County truth nailed after Cardiff visit
arts.sum: And he says Norwich should be prepared to face a Warne team that is inspired by the atmosphere which has helped Derby stay unbeaten at home since Charlton last season. Former Norwich City striker turned pundit Iwan Roberts says his former club should not underestimate the power of Pride Park when they face Derby County tomorrow.

arts.ttl: Norwich City boss makes 'strong' Derby County comments amid response to Canaries fan Paul Warne
arts.sum: Norwich City boss Johannes Hoff Thorup showed his sense of humour after learning that Derby County head coach Paul Warne is a fan of the Canaries. But that will be put to the test again tomorrow by a Norwich side who come into the game off a 4-1 thumping of Watford last weekend.

arts.ttl: 'Norwich are in a good place' - Canaries' Derby trip previewed
arts.sum: Adam Harvey and Samuel Seaman looked ahead to Norwich City's Derby County clash in the latest episode of the Pink Un Preview Show.

arts.ttl: Warne's big call and unlocking Harness - Derby County v Norwich predicted XI
arts.sum: Latest Derby County news from DerbyshireLive looks at the team that Warne could pick to face the Canaries Callum Elder's injury has given Derby County head coach Paul Warne one major decision to make when they face Norwich City at Pride Park tomorrow (12.30pm).

arts.ttl: ‘A real fortress’ – Derby County vs Norwich City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72’s writers offer their Derby County vs Norwich City prediction ahead of their Championship clash on Saturday afternoon. The post ‘A real fortress’ – Derby County vs Norwich City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: 'Quite a big step' - Norwich new boy Forson still adapting
arts.sum: Norwich City summer signing Amankwah Forson is still adapting to the relentless competition of the Championship.
Aaron Ashley has taken a look at all of this weekend's Championship matches and provided a score prediction for each game.

arts.ttl: Crisis-hit Reading open Derby County door to aid Paul Warne transfer plan
arts.sum: Paul Warne believes entering the newly formed National League Cup will give Derby County's academy aces more exposure - and may help lead to loan moves in the future. It will see the Rams enter an under-21s team as part of a Premier League initiative to help develop talent and Warne said: "First and foremost, Dajaune and Ben have both done well at Gateshead because they're both good players.

arts.ttl: FFP, Academy and David Clowes plea after big Derby County ownership update
arts.sum: News that Derby County owner David Clowes is looking for investment into the club to help them build as a Championship force has been met with a mixed response from Rams supporters. The club are seeking further investment to help them compete in the Championship, according to a report in the The Telegraph that says owner, Clowes, has held talks with a number of interested parties from around the world and could be "open to selling 80 per cent of his shareholding to a serious and proper party".
